title: Landing Page Sections Load Correctly
description: Verify that all landing page sections (Hero, Pain Points, How It Works, Audit Score, One-Click Setup, Reviews Management, Post Scheduler, Website Builder, Pricing, Testimonials, Security, Support, FAQ, Final CTA, and Footer) load and display correct content aligned with brand messaging.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Check that Hero section with animated dashboard and CTAs is visible with correct content
Verify Pain Points section displays all expected customer problem cards
Verify How It Works section shows step-by-step process clearly
Audit Score section displays SEO audit score and analytics dashboard
One-Click Setup section displays automation features properly
Reviews Management section shows review dashboard and functionality showcase
Post Scheduler section displays social media scheduling features
Website Builder section presents builder UI and SEO features
Pricing section shows all pricing plans with feature comparisons
Testimonials section loads customer testimonials correctly
Security section displays trust and security elements
Support section presents contact information and support options
FAQ section expands and collapses questions using accordion interface
Final CTA section shows conversion CTAs correctly
Footer displays links, social media icons, and company info

title: Header Navigation Responsiveness and Functionality
description: Verify the responsive header navigation menu functions properly on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices including dropdown menus, search modal, and hamburger menu.

steps.description: Open the site on desktop resolution
Header navigation menu and dropdown menus are visible and interactive
Click each dropdown menu and verify options are accessible
Open search modal via navigation icon and verify search input is focusable and usable
Resize viewport to tablet size
Header navigation adjusts layout appropriately, dropdowns function correctly
Resize viewport to mobile size
Hamburger menu icon appears, clicking it opens the mobile menu with all navigation options
Use the mobile menu to navigate to subpages or perform searches
Navigation selections correctly route user and search works on mobile

title: Animated Dashboard Performance in Hero Section
description: Verify that the animated dashboard preview in the hero section animates smoothly without lag or performance issues across supported browsers and device types.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Animated dashboard preview loads automatically and animations play smoothly
No UI glitches or freezes occur during animation looping
Test animation on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge browsers
Animation performs consistently across all browsers
Load site on desktop and mobile devices
Animation plays smoothly without impacting page responsiveness or causing high CPU usage

title: AI Chatbot Interaction
description: Ensure the AI chatbot interface opens correctly, accepts user inputs, and provides relevant and helpful responses dynamically.

steps.description: Navigate to homepage or any page with chatbot enabled
Click chatbot trigger button to open chatbot interface
Chatbot interface opens and is ready to receive inputs
Type a common query related to Saral One services into chatbot input and send
Chatbot responds with accurate and helpful answer within reasonable time
Type an uncommon or invalid query
Chatbot provides a relevant fallback or politely requests clarification
Close and reopen the chatbot interface multiple times
Chatbot maintains session state or resets cleanly without errors

title: SEO Meta Tags and Structured Data Verification
description: Validate the presence and correctness of SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, Twitter Cards, and JSON-LD structured data on the homepage as per SEO best practices.

steps.description: Load the homepage in a browser
View page source or use browser developer tools to inspect head tags
Meta tags for title, description, viewport, and keywords are present and accurate
Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url) are correct
Twitter Card meta tags are present for sharing preview
Use a structured data testing tool to validate JSON-LD schema data
Structured data is error-free and matches Saral One branding and content

title: Keyboard Navigation for Page Sections
description: Verify that keyboard navigation features allow users to navigate through page sections using arrow keys and vim-style shortcuts efficiently.

steps.description: Focus on the main page content
Press arrow down and arrow up keys to navigate between page sections
Focus shifts sequentially in the expected order across all major sections
Use vim-style shortcuts (e.g., 'j' and 'k') if implemented to navigate up and down
Page sections scroll and focus changes accordingly
Validate that keyboard navigation works on all supported browsers
No keyboard traps or unexpected behavior occurs during navigation

title: Scroll Progress Indicator Functionality
description: Verify that the scroll progress indicator bar at the top of the page accurately reflects the user's scroll position and updates in real time.

steps.description: Load the homepage and verify scroll progress indicator is visible at top
Scroll down slowly from top to bottom
Scroll progress indicator width or fill increases proportionally with page scroll position
Scroll back up to top
Scroll progress indicator resets appropriately to zero or minimal fill
Test the indicator on different screen sizes
Indicator remains visible, functional, and visually correct across devices

title: Floating Action Button Interactions
description: Ensure floating action buttons on the site respond consistently to user interactions and execute their intended quick actions without errors.

steps.description: Load homepage and identify all floating action buttons
Hover and click floating action buttons
Buttons show hover states and execute correct associated actions
Press associated keyboard keys to trigger buttons if supported
Buttons respond to keyboard controls and maintain accessibility
Test multiple quick clicks and verify no glitches or crashes occur

title: Accessibility Compliance for Keyboard and Screen Reader
description: Verify that the website meets accessibility standards including keyboard usability and screen reader compatibility across all interactive and informational content.

steps.description: Navigate through the website using only the keyboard (tab, shift+tab, enter, space)
All interactive elements are reachable and operable via keyboard
Use a screen reader to navigate the homepage
All meaningful content and UI elements have appropriate ARIA roles and labels
No missing or duplicated labels, and content order is logical and understandable
Check color contrast ratios on text and UI elements
Contrast meets WCAG minimum standards for readability

title: Responsive Design across Devices
description: Verify the mobile-first responsive design maintains usability and visual integrity across a variety of devices including phones, tablets, and desktops in various orientations.

steps.description: Open the website on phones of various resolutions
Site layout adapts correctly: text scales, images and components resize or rearrange properly
Open on tablets and verify layout and interactive elements render correctly
Open on desktop browsers and verify full site layout and interactive features
Rotate devices to landscape and portrait modes
Site reflows and remains fully accessible and visually consistent
Test commonly used browsers on all device types
No rendering bugs or usability issues observed

title: 404 Not Found Page Redirect and Display
description: Verify that unmatched routes redirect users to a custom 404 page that presents user-friendly messaging and navigation options.

steps.description: Navigate to a non-existent URL path in the site
User is redirected to the 404 Not Found page
404 page displays clear messaging that page is not found
404 page provides navigation links or buttons back to homepage or other main sections
Click navigation options on the 404 page
Navigation functions correctly and user is routed properly

title: Consultation Booking CTA Functionality
description: Ensure all prominent consultation booking call-to-action buttons redirect correctly to the booking interface and track user engagement metrics.

steps.description: Identify all consultation booking CTA buttons on the homepage and relevant sections
Click each consultation booking CTA button
User is redirected to the correct booking or contact page
Booking interface loads completely and allows user to proceed
Monitor tracking events or analytics to verify that CTA clicks are logged
